name: Ranier von Omerta || Ball
description:
Picture me and then you start watching
Watching forever


Your first royal ball since becoming his betrothed.

Your dreams are finally coming true!

You've officially become the crown princess and soon, you and Ranier will be wed!

If you can make it to the wedding that is.

Because there are those who would love to tear you down and steal your place by his side.

But Ranier loves you.

Not them.

Maybe love really can conquer all!


I feel like Ranier is so polarizing as a character with some people loving him and some hating him. I personally think he's a very interesting intersection of love vs. duty when it comes to being a regent.

I love this scenario because you can take it in so many directions. Angst, Fluff, Drama, etc. So I hope you all enjoy it to.

Since Karlina would be too young to be your opponent here because she'd be 17/18, we have a new entry in the try to steal Ranier's heart club

Today's song is by New Order and its off Sofia Coppola's Maria Antoinette soundtrack which is perhaps my FAVORITE movie soundtrack ever. When I finally got to go to versailles I played this on my headphones and walked around the palace. I just love it so much.

Also, thank you to Synnie for my new Link buttons. Everyone should give Rotwire a follow!

More Ranier:
He's taking a concubine
Losing his Virginity
His concubine is pregnant
Him coming to rescue you
His coronation
Your wedding
You've been accused of treason
creator: m00nprincess
